{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318262775D66427A70B838BE472"}"},"total":293},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7584003528936227646","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"英俊潇洒  帅呆酷毙  风流倜傥  玉树临风  年少多知  聪明伶俐  活泼可爱  风度翩翩  气宇不凡  全国杰出十大青年  更难得三岁习文  七岁习武   才高八斗  学富九车  上知天文地理  下晓鸡毛蒜皮  无所不知  无所不能  无所不晓  每逢外出行走  常引美女回头  帅哥跳楼  其优点多如滔滔江水连绵不断  又犹如黄河泛滥  一发不可收拾  真乃人中之龙  旷世奇才","text_exts":[{"e":186,"s":182,"text":"人中之龙","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%BA%E4%B8%AD%E4%B9%8B%E9%BE%99&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774261587838BE472%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227584003528936227646%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227546552963376876568%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%BA%E4%B8%AD%E4%B9%8B%E9%BE%99%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765791828,"group_id":"7546552963376876568","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4EkGcq8kU2zrxoy8EazlAA5K+BBBvFbhu5bk8lCKwV3","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/99e3b68dc55248b28a87deeeb532fc36~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795169&x-signature=oNJSpAcDscnXNQhzr091HxnwYSY%3D","user_id":"4111789731360332","user_name":"李明澜🐲"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4111789731360332","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7546552963376876568","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统＋有脑子＋权谋争霸＋辅佐刘备＋偶尔日常搞笑＋冷兵器战争】
曹操：北伐！！臣定助陛下，还于旧都！
孙权：只有联蜀抗刘，方可保我东吴平安。
如果统一北方的是刘备，被赶去蜀地的是曹操，故事又会如何演变？
忆斩蛇汉祖，震臂遥呼，一战定西楚。
四百载已出，风云翻复，气数已无？
时梁冠贪毒，民心动怒，烽火燃中土。
值黄天再出，高举义帜，天下何辜？
逢蛟龙起舞，匡扶汉室，真心难猜已作古。
犹茅庐三顾，桃园焚起清香一炉。
（作者写过百万字完结三国和百万字完结红楼，虽然不算多好，但也在进步中。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/49957d973701b5f5d97d563129241d10","author":"烟柳画桥","author_id":"","book_id":"7546552963376876568","book_name":"三国：讨饭到复汉","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7546559797408039448","read_count":"30961","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"361006"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"153","tags":"历史古代,历史,重生,三国,搞笑轻松,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8e84f4c6495d6440a4f6980d96dd2afa~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445587&x-signature=pC%2FIbHYC%2BU53BTKx5IbqPM2lHCw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1785204195474488","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"59"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318262775D66427A70B838BE472"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_c
